svg.title: DealMind AI — Full System Architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end flow from user message through objection detection, CRM lookup, Hindsight memory recall, Groq LLM, and final response with memory save.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the user input look like in DealMind AI?')
sendPrompt('How does objection detection work in DealMind AI?')
sendPrompt('What CRM data does DealMind pull from the CSV files?')
sendPrompt('How does Hindsight memory recall work in DealMind AI?')
sendPrompt('How does the strategy engine decide which strategy to suggest?')
sendPrompt('Why does DealMind AI use qwen3-32b on Groq?')
sendPrompt('What does a typical DealMind AI response look like?')
sendPrompt('How is the response delivered in the DealMind UI?')
sendPrompt('How does Hindsight save memory after each interaction?')
sendPrompt('What is in the accounts.csv file?')
sendPrompt('What is in the sales_pipeline.csv file?')
sendPrompt('What products are in DealMind\'s dataset?')
sendPrompt('How is deals_master.csv created from the raw data?')

svg.text: Click any node to explore further
